ddt:Target.Name: EBA_X10ph2_PHEV_HEV_v5.4
ddt:Target.Description:
V 5.4 Author: C. COMISAN Autoident update
V 5.2 Author: C. COMISAN Date: 18.05.2020
Updated autoident list. Added new DIDs that are present into the UDS 1.01 but at the status TBD. Modified the EBR request did for B0F0 to B010 Corrected F194 and F195 to have the correct lengths.
R.Gautier
_FWwkRlCnEemrR5KmZC3guA -> Build 69 _eJrbLmS6Eemf_pEXqN17yA -> Build 71 _ZJvuG3sOEemgs-yrBfi_Xg -> Build 73 _x1US8HuxEemgs-yrBfi_Xg -> Build 74 _ihr6zJQyEem0Ucj5ZvqqnA -> Build 75 _gD8sT5mDEemnAe51ow9CLg -> Build 76 _kjDOEfAHEemJmt-sEhYXbQ -> Build 79 _7MFatArjEeqadplWL4rJZw -> Build 80 _KEbWUj7CEeqpPsT12-JALw -> Build 81
C.SALIBA chadi.saliba-extern@renault.com v4 modification base diag BSS4
G WOUASSI (SERMA) guillaume.wouassi-extern@renault.com v3 correction fault type DTC $58F7 et $58F8

Data.Name: CalibrationNumber
Data.Description:
This value shall be used to reference the vehicle manufacturer specific ECU application data identification record.

The format of the application data identification structure shall be ECU specific and defined by the vehicle manufacturer.

Data.Name: ECUSerialNumber
Data.Description:
This value shall be used to reference the ECU (server) serial number.

Record data content and format shall be server specific.

Data.Name: VIN
Data.Description:
This value shall be used to reference the VIN number.

Record data content and format shall be specified by the vehicle manufacturer.

It shall not be erased when the ECU is reprogrammed.

Data.Name: vehicleManufacturerECUHardwareNumber
Data.Description:
This value shall be used by reading services to reference the vehicle-manufacturer-specific ECU (server) hardware number.

Record data content and format shall be serverspecific and defined by vehicle manufacturer.

Data.Name: systemSupplierECUSoftwareNumber
Data.Description:
This value shall be used to reference the system supplier specific ECU (server) software number.

Record data content and format shall be server specific and defined by the system supplier.

Data.Name: systemSupplierECUSoftwareVersionNumber
Data.Description:
This value shall be used to reference the system supplier specific ECU (server) software version number.

Record data content and format shall be server specific and defined by the system supplier.

Data.Name: diagnosticVersion
Data.Description:
This value shall be used to reference the diagnostic version of the ECU.

It is defined by the vehicle manufacturer.

Refer to manufacture ECU designer.

Item.Text: Controle Module Communication - Private CAN No transmission
Controle Module Communication - Private CAN BUS OFF
Current consumption in EDLC Mode in Failure
EDLC Failure B-IN circuit and monitor circuit error
EDLC Failure Cell short or overvoltage error
EDLC Failure Charging control circuit error
EDLC Failure Discharging circuit open error
EDLC Failure Discharging circuit short error
Lost Communication with BCM on Chassis CAN
Lost Communication with USM on Chassis CAN
Loste communication with ECM on Chassis CAN
Loste communication with HEVC on Chassis CAN
Loste communication with VDC on Chassis CAN
Lost Communication with VDC on Vehicle CAN
Device and failure type ODB codding
FM (Freq Mod) / PWM (Pulse Width Mod) Failures
circuit short to ground or open
circuit short to battery or open
signal rate of change below threshold
signal rate of change above threshold
signal bias level / zero adjustment failure
signal has too few transitions / events
signal has too many transitions / events
alive / sequence counter incorrect / not updated
value of signal protection calculation incorrect
Component or operation obstructed or blocked
FM (Freq Mod) / PWM (Pulse Width Mod) Failures

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.AgingCounter
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData AgingCounter (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.DTCFirstAppearMileage
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData Mileage (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.DTCLastDiseappearMileage
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData Mileage (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.DTCOccurrenceCounter
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData DTCOccurenceCounter (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.Mileage
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData Mileage (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Data.Name: DTCFormatIdentifier
Data.Comment: DTC format - Renault/Nissan use value 0 (3 bytes DTC)

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.DTCOccurrenceCounter_2
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData DTCOccurenceCounter (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.DTCTravelledDistanceFailurePresent
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData Mileage (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Data.Name: eDLCinDefaultDisplayRequest
Data.Comment: En cas de défaillance de l'eDLC permet d'envoie une requête lampe jaune au TdB

Data.Name: WakeUpType
Data.Comment: Permet de selctionner different mode de WakeUp

Data.Name: VehicleSpeed
Data.Comment: Permet de connaitre la vitesse des roues motrices

Data.Name: vehicleManufacturerSparePartNumber
Data.Comment: Ordered Part Number - This value shall contain the number of the part ordered by OEM
Data.Description:
This value shall be used to reference the vehicle manufacturer spare part number.

Record data content and format shall be server specific and defined by the vehicle manufacturer.

Data.Name: Vehicle Status
Data.Comment: Permet de connaitre l'état du véhicule

Item.Text: PPU active control / not active control
PFC active control / not active control
EBR permitted by diag / inhibited by diag
EBR active control / not active control

Data.Name: ExternalBrakeStatus
Data.Comment: Permet de savoir si il est possible de réaliser une requête externe

Data.Name: ExternalBrakeRequestPriority
Data.Comment: Permet de savoir si c'est le conducteur qui appuie sur la pédale ou si c'est une requête externe

Data.Name: RearPressureReductionStatus
Data.Comment: Permet de savoir quel est l'action à réaliser sur l'axe arriére

Data.Name: HBCrequest_RCY
Data.Comment: Permet de réclamer le mode HBC (redondance CAN Chassis)

Data.Name: TargetPressurePedalFeel
Data.Comment: Permet de connaitre le niveau de pression demandé par l'utilisation

Data.Name: PedalFeelActuationStatus
Data.Comment: Permet de savoir si il y a une compendation de l'ESP

Data.Name: ExternalBrakeValueRequest
Data.Comment: Volume de liquide de frein à déplacer par seconde pendant une requête externe

Data.Name: ExternalBrakeRequestStatus
Data.Comment: Permet de réaliser des requête externe de freinage (AEB, ACC ...)

Data.Name: IgnitionSupplyConfirmation
Data.Comment: Permet de connaitre si létat ignition est passé

Data.Name: EBA_CapacityPressureCompValue
Data.Comment: Indication de la valeur de pression

Data.Name: EBA_BrakePedalApplied
Data.Comment: La pédale de frein est apppuyé ou non

Data.Name: EBAtoBeCalibrated
Data.Comment: Permet à l'EBA de demander à être calibré

Data.Name: EBAinCalibratingDiag
Data.Comment: Permet de transmettre l'information que l'EBA est en callibration

Data.Name: EBAfailureDisplayAlert_EBA
Data.Comment: Permet d'allumer une lampe rouge au TdB

Data.Name: EBA_RefuseToSleep
Data.Comment: Permet à l'EBA de l'endormir ou non

Data.Name: BrakePedalPositionDistance
Data.Comment: Position de la pédale de Frein

Data.Name: BCM_WakeUpSleepCommand
Data.Comment: Signal de Whake Up reçu par la BCM

Data.Name: DistanceTotalizer
Data.Comment: Permet de connaitre le kilométrage du véhicule et noter le kilométrage lorsqu'une panne se produit

Data.Name: CaliperPlungerMaxPressure
Data.Comment: Permet de connaitre la pression au niveau des étriers

Data.Name: ABSinRegulation_CRBS
Data.Comment: Permet de savoir si il y a une régulation ABS pour réduire l'action de l'EBA

Data.Name: BatteryVoltage
Data.Comment: Affiche la valeur de la tension

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.IUPRnumerator
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.IUPRdenominator
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData(use by Failure Page to decode data)

Data.Name: eDLC_voltage
Data.Comment: niveau de tension disponible dans la eDLC

Data.Name: ABS in regulation
Data.Comment: Permet de savoir si il y a une régulation ABS pour réduire l'action de l'EBA

Request.Name: TesterPresent.WithResponse
Request.Comment: This request enable P2P tester present for tool (Screen, IOctl, ...)

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportExtendedData
Request.Comment: DDT2000 Failures page requests : Unusable in the standard tools of DDT2000

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportExtendedData.IUPRdenominator
Request.Comment: Request for the import in the Clip

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportExtendedData.IUPRnumerator
Request.Comment: Request for the import in the Clip

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportExtendedData.DTCFirstAppearMileage
Request.Comment: Request for the import in the Clip

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportExtendedData.DTCTravelledDistanceFailurePresent
Request.Comment: Request for the import in the Clip

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportExtendedData.DTCLastDiseappearMileage
Request.Comment: Request for the import in the Clip

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportExtendedData.DTCOccurrenceCounter
Request.Comment: Request for the import in the Clip

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportExtendedData.AgingCounter
Request.Comment: Request for the import in the Clip

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportExtendedData.Mileage
Request.Comment: Request for the import in the Clip

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportSnapshot
Request.Comment: DDT2000 Failures page requests / Clip import : Unusable in the standard tools of DDT2000

Request.Name: DataRead.ConfigurationDataReferenceAfterConfigurationProcess
Request.Comment: Request $22 - Dossier de Configuration reference information written for Nissan vehicles in plan

Test.Description: Runout is reduce due to high temperature or low voltage

Device.Name: Loste communication with VDC on Chassis CAN

Test.Description: Missing message: ff_VDC_TIMEOUT (on Chassis CAN : ff_VDC_A8_TIMEOUT & ff_VDC_A11_TIMEOUT & ff_VDC_A12_TIMEOUT )

Device.Name: Loste communication with HEVC on Chassis CAN

Test.Description: Missing message: ff_HEVC_TIMEOUT (on Chassis CAN : ff_HEVC_R17_TIMEOUT & ff_HEVC_R18_TIMEOUT)

Device.Name: Loste communication with ECM on Chassis CAN

Test.Description: Missing message: ff_ECM_TIMEOUT (on Chassis CAN : ff_ECM_A8_TIMEOUT & ff_ECM_A9_TIMEOUT & ff_ECM_A11_TIMEOUT )

Device.Name: Lost Communication with VDC on Vehicle CAN

Test.Description: Missing message: ff_VDC_TIMEOUT (on Vehicel1 CAN : ff_VDC_A4_TIMEOUT & ff_VDC_A9_TIMEOUT)

Device.Name: Lost Communication with USM on Chassis CAN

Test.Description: Missing message: ff_USM_TIMEOUT (on Chassis CAN : ff_USM_A2_TIMEOUT)

Device.Name: Lost Communication with BCM on Chassis CAN

Test.Description: Missing message: ff_BCM_TIMEOUT (on Chassis CAN : ff_BCM_A7_TIMEOUT)
EBR signal is invalide link to the Node : "qTargetExternal_Net"

Device.Name: EDLC Failure Discharging circuit short error
EDLC Failure Discharging circuit open error
EDLC Failure Charging control circuit error
EDLC Failure Cell short or overvoltage error
EDLC Failure B-IN circuit and monitor circuit error

Test.Description: B-IN circuit and monitor circuit error
Brake Booster Temperature Sensor "C" Circuit Low
Brake Booster Temperature Sensor "C" Circuit High
Brake Booster Temperature Sensor "B" Circuit Low
Brake Booster Temperature Sensor "B" Circuit High

Device.Name: Current consumption in EDLC Mode in Failure
Device.Mnemonic: current consumption in EDLC is in failure

Device.Name: Battery Voltage compliance
Device.Mnemonic: compliance voltage between can information and UBB measurement is in Failure

Test.Description: Compliance Voltage between CAN information and UBB measurement is in failure
